name: Workflow Builder
short_description: Create and edit declarative Leda workflows visually.
long_description: The built-in canvas for assembling workflows from safe node types. Drag triggers, brains, plugin calls, confirmations, and verifications into a graph. Ships with Leda.
declared_permissions: Read and write your workflow drafts
cannot_access: Cannot read files outside the workflow editor
changelog: Initial demo listing for the marketplace preview.

name: Notes Summarizer
short_description: Summarize and save notes from inside your workflows.
long_description: A native plugin that summarizes text and saves results to your notes. Used by several demo workflows. Ships with Leda.
cannot_access: Cannot read your full file system
changelog: Initial demo listing for the marketplace preview.

name: Dify Connector
short_description: Connect Leda workflows to Dify-hosted AI apps.
long_description: A verified connector that lets a workflow call a Dify-hosted app as a step. Metadata-only listing; configuration happens in the workflow editor.
declared_permissions: Send your workflow input to the configured Dify app
cannot_access: Cannot read files outside the workflow step
installation_instructions: Add a 'call Dify plugin' node in the workflow editor and point it at your Dify app.
changelog: Verified demo listing for the marketplace preview.

name: Screenshot Agent
short_description: Capture and describe what's on screen for a workflow step.
long_description: Experimental plugin that captures a screenshot and returns a description for the main brain to reason over. Early-stage and clearly labeled as experimental.
declared_permissions: Capture a screenshot when you run the workflow
cannot_access: Cannot upload images without your action
installation_instructions: Add a 'call native plugin' node and select Screenshot Agent.
changelog: Experimental demo listing for the marketplace preview.

name: WhatsApp Agent
short_description: Send WhatsApp messages from a workflow, with confirmation.
long_description: A community plugin that sends WhatsApp messages as a workflow step. Designed to be used behind an ask-confirmation node so nothing is sent without approval.
cannot_access: Cannot read your full chat history
installation_instructions: Add a 'call native plugin' node and select WhatsApp Agent. Pair it with an ask-confirmation node.
changelog: Community demo listing for the marketplace preview.

name: Calendar Reminder Tool
short_description: Read your calendar and trigger reminders. Coming soon.
long_description: A planned plugin that reads upcoming calendar events so workflows can build reminders. Not yet available — shown as a preview of what's coming.
changelog: Coming-soon demo listing for the marketplace preview.
